hero_page_heading.subtitle: WebAR Case Study
bloomingdales.stats.conversion.title: Increased Conversion Rate
bloomingdales.stats.engagement.title: Increased Engagement Rate
bloomingdales.meta.title: Bloomingdale's 150th Anniversary WebAR - Case Study
bloomingdales.meta.description: See how Bloomingdale's celebrated their 150th Anniversary with an immersive, shoppable, and shareable experience in this 8th Wall WebAR case study.
bloomingdales.hero.heading: Bloomingdale's celebrates 150 Years with AR Catalog
bloomingdales.overview.paragraph: Bloomingdale's partnered with ROSE to showcase their 150th Anniversary Collection through AR-activated catalogs that enabled customers to explore must-have styles in their own space using WebAR. The unique and innovative shopping experience combined the physical and digital worlds, boosting customer confidence in their purchase and increasing conversion to purchase.
bloomingdales.overview.quote: When partnering with luxury fashion brands on augmented reality, our focus is always on photorealism down to the thread. For this experience we created custom shaders and lighting to bring looks from brands like Balenciaga, Armani and Paul Smith to life for Bloomingdale’s customers. What we found is that photorealism paired with high quality assets leads to both engagement and conversion for retail and fashion brands.
bloomingdales.overview.quote_citation: Evan Rose, CEO and founder of ROSE
bloomingdales.experience.paragraph:
Bloomingdales sent over 400,000 AR-enabled catalogs to create an immersive, shoppable, and shareable experience with the help of 8th Wall's image target and holograms.

Customers scanned a QR code inside the catalog to activate the WebAR experience. Next, they pointed their camera at an image target to automatically showcase exclusive looks in their own physical space. The holograms of models helped users see how the styles looked and moved in real-life.

Customers seamlessly tapped to purchase their favorite styles directly inside the experience. Additionally, Bloomingdale’s and ROSE created buzz by allowing customers to record and share the experiences to their social platforms
bloomingdales.results.paragraph: From the 400,000+ AR-activated catalogs, the memorable experience led to a +22% conversion rate to shop, with an average of 4 looks explored and a +38% engagement rate.
bloomingdales.about.paragraph: <0>{{studioName}}</0> is an award winning Black-owned AR agency. We concept, design, build, deploy and measure the impact of AR experiences tailored to your KPIs. We specialize in creating lifelike AR for Retail, Fashion, Food and Beverage, Spirits and CPG.
bonviv.stats.click_through_rate.title: Click-through Rate
bonviv.stats.dwell_time.title: Average Dwell Time
bonviv.meta.title: Bon V!V Spiked Seltzer OOH WebAR - Case Study
bonviv.meta.description: Learn how Bon V!V Spiked Seltzer used an innovative WebAR experience to engage customers and drive sales through an immersive OOH campaign.
bonviv.hero.heading: Bon V!V creates immersive OOH AR experience for its Spiked Seltzer
bonviv.overview.paragraph: BON V!V Spiked Seltzer teamed up with WebAR agency Aircards to create an engaging out-of-home (OOH) AR advertising campaign throughout Los Angeles and San Diego. Activated by a QR code scan printed within mural graphics, the AR experience featured a virtual vending machine, a branded map of store locations carrying the product, and an ecommerce integration for immediate purchase.
bonviv.overview.quote: The BON V!V AR OOH experience was an incredible example of how Web-based Augmented Reality can be used to effectively drive customer engagement and sales. It was a pleasure working with the Anheuser-Busch team to create something that has never been seen before - combining creativity with cutting-edge technology from 8th Wall, resulting in a high-performing  Out-of-Home marketing campaign that was truly unique.
bonviv.overview.quote_citation: Matt Watson, Chief Marketing Officer at Aircards
bonviv.experience.paragraph:
Bon V!V drew in customers with an engaging WebAR experience activated by a QR code printed within mural graphics. A full 3D vending machine launched with interactive animations using image targets, allowing users the opportunity to select and dispense their favorite flavor can of BON V!V Spiked Seltzer.

Customers continued along the shopper journey through two retail call-to-action integrations: a custom branded map functionality and an ecommerce integration with Instacart. With the custom-branded map, customers could find the nearest store selling BON V!V’s Spiked Seltzer. Tapping on a pin displayed the quickest route to get to that store. With the ecommerce integration with Instacart, customers could purchase their chosen BON V!V Spiked Seltzers and receive a delivery within a few hours.

This campaign gave BON V!V an additional activation channel by allowing customers to access the experience from a social media link and place the 3D content within their own setting.
bonviv.results.paragraph: The experience drew in users for an average 2 minutes dwell time and generated a 58% click-through rate to ‘Find Nearest Store.’
bonviv.about.paragraph: <0>{{studioName}}</0> is a market-leading, end-to-end WebXR development agency focused exclusively on designing, building and deploying WebXR experiences. Aircards offers an exclusive Spatial Analytics feature for tracking detailed user behavior within any 3D scene.
bully_whoppa.stats.press_coverage.title: Press Coverage
bully_whoppa.meta.title: Burger King and Tinie Tempah WebAR - Case Study
bully_whoppa.meta.description: bully! brought the world’s tiniestAR concert on a burger to life for Burger King and Tinie Tempah. Tinie Tempah sings “Whoppa” on a Burger King Whopper, the world’s tiniest concert created by bully! driving staggering social results.
bully_whoppa.hero.heading: Burger King and Tinie Tempah host tiniest AR concert to engage Whopper lovers
bully_whoppa.overview.paragraph:
bully! brought the world’s first private AR concert on a burger to life for Burger King and Tinie Tempah, with volumetric capture from Dimension Studio and creative direction from London’s BBH.

The activation, featuring a Tiny Tinie Tempah performing his song, “Whoppa” on a Whopper, leveraged Web AR tool set 8th Wall to spawn from QR code stickers placed on burgers at locations across the UK, Columbia, and Peru.
bully_whoppa.overview.quote: 8th Wall’s ability to deliver high production value content with seamless, anytime/anywhere, browser-based access is a game changer. Their powerful development tools are sure to revolutionize how brands and marketers connect with consumers. At bully!, we see it as a critical piece in any brand’s go-to-market plan.
bully_whoppa.overview.quote_citation: Carlson Bull, CEO & Founder at bully! entertainment
bully_whoppa.experience.paragraph:
At a time when all festivals and shows were canceled, Burger King and UK rap artist, Tinie Tempah, teamed up to deliver the world’s tiniest concert. To create this WebAR experience, bully! worked with Dimension Studios to record Tinie performing his hit single using volumetric capture. The volumetric video was then exported and added on top of a 3D rendering of a Burger King Whopper. This allowed a hologram of Tinie to perform his latest hit ‘Whoppa’, with the iconic signature burger as his stage.

Fans who wanted to engage with the experience could visit Burger King locations across the UK, Columbia, and Peru and scan the QR code placed on the wrapper of a Burger King Whopper. Once scanned, users could place Tinie on a Whopper in their physical space and see the personal performance.
bully_whoppa.results.paragraph: The campaign achieved whopping results with 10.8 Million social impressions driven by influencer activity and 220 pieces of media coverage from across the globe.
bully_whoppa.about.paragraph: <0>{{studioName}}</0> is an international creative XR studio that delivers high-end, emerging-tech experiences that inspire audiences and help brands stand out. We create experiences audiences love.
jumanji.stats.dwell_time.title: Average dwell time
jumanji.stats.time_spent.title: Industry avg. of time spent in WebAR
jumanji.stats.amazon_lex.title: WebAR project to use Amazon Lex
jumanji.meta.title: Jumanji: The Next Level WebAR - Case Study
jumanji.meta.description: Promoting the release of Jumanji: The Next Level and driving movie ticket sales by immersing fans into the world of Jumanji, with one of the first voice-activated AR experiences on the web.
jumanji.hero.heading: Sony Takes Jumanji Fans to the Next Level
jumanji.overview.paragraph: For the launch of the highly anticipated movie sequel Jumanji: The Next Level, Sony partnered with Trigger— The Mixed Reality Agency® to create a highly interactive and accessible augmented reality experience. Jumanji fans explored new levels of gameplay in an immersive environment, without having to download an app. The star-studded experience resulted in exceptional dwell time, with fans spending on average more than 5 minutes in the world of Jumanji (over 2.5x the industry average time spent in a WebAR activation.) It integrated with Amazon Lex to be one of the world's first voice-activated Web AR commercial experiences.
jumanji.overview.quote: By bringing the first voice-activated AR experience to the web, we married technical innovation with powerful storytelling in an immersive and highly engaging experience with help from our partners at Sony Pictures, AWS and 8th Wall. It's always gratifying to work with fellow pioneers like 8th Wall who share our enthusiasm for pushing the boundaries through emerging technology.
jumanji.overview.quote_citation: Jason Yim, CEO and Executive Creative Director for Trigger
jumanji.experience.paragraph: Fans are immersed into the world of Jumanji with one of the first voice-activated AR experiences on the web. Saying “show me Jumanji” activates the virtual map, where users can visit surreal locations from the movie and watch as jungle animals run wild in detailed 3D scenes. The WebAR experience unlocks exclusive content, such as never-before-seen videos featuring the cast including Dwayne Johnson, Karen Gillan, Nick Jonas, and Jack Black. Fans are seamlessly directed to the ticket purchasing flow upon saying "buy tickets."
jumanji.results.paragraph: Fans were able to experience another level of the Jumanji film by becoming immersed in exclusive content and 3D worlds which resulted in invaluable brand engagement. In the first month after release, the average time spent within the experience was just over 5 minutes of dwell time per user. The WebAR activation was shared by celebrities including Dwayne ‘The Rock’ Johnson on social media and was selected as a finalist for the 2020 Auggie Awards in the ‘Best Campaign’ category.
jumanji.about.paragraph: <0>{{studioName}}</0> is a full service agency based in Los Angeles that works with the world’s top brands to employ next-gen XR technology from concept and development to deployment and measurement.
khaite.stats.dwell_time.title: Avg. dwell time (Min)
khaite.stats.increase_sales.title: Increase in sales of featured collection
khaite.stats.inline_ar.title: WebAR project to use inline AR
khaite.meta.title: Khaite WebAR - Case Study
khaite.meta.description: KHAITE used WebAR to bring its latest fashions into the homes of customers, increasing sales by 400%.
khaite.hero.heading: KHAITE saw a 4x increase in shoe sales with its SS21 WebAR-enabled lookbook
khaite.overview.paragraph: New York-based fashion label KHAITE worked with creative agency ROSE to give customers and industry buyers a deep visual experience of its Spring-Summer 2021 collection unlike any other fashion brand has been able to accomplish with WebAR. Widely-supported and deeply interactive, the WebAR experience highlighted the unique details of KHAITE's footwear designs and offered endless creative freedom for the user to explore. It was also featured in Vogue, British Vogue, The New York Times, and Harper’s Bazaar for everyone to enjoy. This led to a 4x increase in sales of the collection featured in WebAR.
khaite.overview.quote: 8th Wall enabled ROSE to rapidly prototype and optimize the KHAITE embedded AR fashion experience. Using the cloud editor our team was able to collaborate from asset updates to lighting tweaks to coding transitions. Removing the need to manage CI/CD and infrastructure enabled our engineering team to focus on doing what they do best, building beautiful, photorealistic immersive experiences that engage and delight users.
khaite.overview.quote_citation: Evan Rose, Founder & President of Rose Digital
khaite.experience.paragraph:
The experience utilized photogrammetry to 3D scan the footwear, the designs were made into 3D models with accurate fabric materials and textures, that can be “placed” onto any surface in any environment. The end result was an experience tailored to each model, allowing users to see each one in its best light. Users have the freedom to scale, rotate, and walk around each shoe to examine the details.

A small list of influencers and buyers received a printed lookbook, created by Chandelier Creative that paired with the digital experience. Users that had the lookbook could place the AR shoes by scanning images within the printed book, allowing the designs to come to life from 2D to 3D instantaneously. The use of the lookbook and additional WebAR functionality created a more exclusive experience for a subset of users without the need to create two different experiences.
khaite.results.paragraph: This experience was the first to use 8th Wall's inline WebAR functionality which embedded the augmented reality experience into KHAITE's home page. This resulted in a huge success for KHAITE as they saw a 4x increase in sales of the collection featured in WebAR. In addition, consumers spent on average over 4 minutes interacting with the WebAR experience.
khaite.about.paragraph: <0>{{studioName}}</0> is an award winning black-owned AR agency. We concept, design, build, deploy and measure the impact of AR experiences tailored to your KPIs. We specialize in creating lifelike AR for Retail, Fashion, Food and Beverage, Spirits and CPG.
la_dodgers.stats.dwell_time.title: Average dwell time (min)
la_dodgers.meta.title: Golden Road Brewing WebAR - Case Study
la_dodgers.meta.description: Anhueser-Busch InBev celebrates historic L.A. Dodgers World Series with web-based augmented reality Face Effect for fans to share on social media.
la_dodgers.hero.heading: L.A. Dodgers and Golden Road Brewing Celebrate World Series Win with WebAR Face Effect
la_dodgers.overview.paragraph: To celebrate the L.A. Dodgers World Series win in 2020, Anheuser-Busch InBev owned brand Golden Road Brewing worked with WebAR agency Aircards to deliver a unique branded WebAR Face Effect. The experience enabled fans to celebrate the win, drink a virtual can of Dodgers Blonde Ale and also trigger falling L.A. Dodgers logo confetti. The campaign was delivered across both digital and print channels, including Golden Road Brewing's social media and a full-page print advertisement in the L.A. Times newspaper that included a QR code activation.
la_dodgers.overview.quote: We were delighted to help L.A. Dodger fans celebrate their epic World Series win! As an 8th Wall Premier Partner, there is no other developer platform to which we would turn to create an outstanding WebAR experience for our client network, and this project for AB InBev was no different. Creating a WebAR Face Effect enabled the brand to reach a diverse audience across a variety of online and print channels, something that app-based AR can't match.
la_dodgers.overview.quote_citation: Adin Gold, Head of AR at Aircards
la_dodgers.experience.paragraph: Dodgers fans were able to celebrate the World Series win with a WebAR Face Effect which featured the Dodgers Blonde Ale. The Face Effect put a L.A. Dodgers cap on the user and prompted them to “Tap To Celebrate!”. Once tapped, fans could drink a virtual can of Dodgers Blonde Ale and sparked falling L.A. Dodgers logo confetti. Fans could then take a photo or video of them celebrating with the filter and share it on social media. They could also tap to redeem a rebate coupon, which activated a custom map integration to show their nearest physical store location to purchase the Dodgers Blonde Ale.
la_dodgers.results.paragraph: Fans engaged with the branded WebAR Face Effects experience for 1 minute and 28 seconds on average. Dodger fans spent time having fun with the face filter, replaying it multiple times, viewing the custom map and tapping through to the rebate. In fact, this experience demonstrated an 18% click-through-rate of the rebate found in-experience.
la_dodgers.about.paragraph: <0>{{studioName}}</0> is an agency specializing in the development of Web-based Augmented and Virtual Reality experiences, with a highly talented in-house team of WebAR/VR developers, 3D artists, project managers and creatives. Providing an end-to-end service that includes consulting, ideation, design, development, hosting and analytics, Aircards is dedicated to ensuring they are at the forefront of innovation in the web-based immersive technology sector.
pink_floyd.stats.dwell_time.title: Average dwell time
pink_floyd.stats.countries_reached.title: Countries reached
pink_floyd.meta.title: Pink Floyd WebAR - Case Study
pink_floyd.meta.description: Promoting the release of Pink Floyd's The Later Years box set by bringing iconic album artwork to life in augmented reality with a shareable, immersive experience.
pink_floyd.hero.heading: Pink Floyd Immerses Fans Into The Later Years Album
pink_floyd.overview.paragraph: For the release of The Later Years, an 18-disc box set from legendary rock band Pink Floyd, Sony Legacy Recordings partnered with agency Draw & Code to create a WebAR activation that would appeal to Floyd aficionados, with the goal of bringing the band's visually stunning album artwork and epic music to life so that fans could experience it like never before. The key aims for the experience were to be frictionless, to offer complex visuals anchored within the real world of the user and to encourage fans around the globe to spend time engaging with and capturing the experience.
pink_floyd.overview.quote: Web AR is the hottest technology right now and it is a key growth area for Draw & Code. Using 8th Wall to deliver marketing activations for Sony Music has been a big success for us. The toolkit gives us everything we need to create and support engaging experiences that reach large audiences.
pink_floyd.overview.quote_citation: Andy Cooper, Co-Founder of Draw & Code
pink_floyd.experience.paragraph: With the tap of a link, fans become instantly immersed in the world of Pink Floyd. Life-size, animated versions of surrealistic artwork from the album surround the user, rising from the earth and contorting to the tune of the band's iconic songs. Fans can easily capture and share photos of their dreamlike experience.
pink_floyd.results.paragraph: The Pink Floyd Later Years WebAR Experience launched just before the holiday season and during its first week alone, tens of thousands of users across nearly 140 countries tried it. In total, the promotion saw over 76,000 user sessions and boasted an average dwell time of 1 minute and 47 seconds, with numerous photos captured by fans and posted to social media across the globe. The stunning visual results earned the team the 2020 Silver Telly Award and as well as a Finalist for 2020 Auggie Awards ‘Best Campaign’.
pink_floyd.about.paragraph: <0>{{studioName}}</0> are immersive technology specialists based in the cultural heart of Liverpool where they harness emerging technologies, create innovative art and develop sophisticated immersive experiences including augmented reality, virtual reality and projection mapping.
pot_noodle.stats.reach.title: Reach
pot_noodle.stats.dwell_time.title: Avg. dwell time (Min)
pot_noodle.meta.title: Unilever's Pot Noodle WebAR - Case Study
pot_noodle.meta.description: Unilever's Pot Noodle WebAR experience allows students to place an interactive 3D career fair in their own living room
pot_noodle.hero.heading: Pot Noodle (Unilever) launches virtual Career Fair for students
pot_noodle.overview.paragraph: For the return of its Career Fair in 2021, Unilever's Pot Noodle partnered with WebAR agency Aircards to launch a multi-platform virtual event. The mobile version was a full web-based augmented reality experience which allowed students to “Tap to Place” the 3D career fair in their own living room. Students could physically walk around the fair, visit the employer booths and click-through to apply to the alternative career available. This led to students spending an average of 4 minutes and 30 seconds in the experience with an 8% conversion rate of job applicants. This resulted in a 500% increase in job applications as compared to previous in person career fairs events.
pot_noodle.overview.quote: Aircards worked with Pot Noodle to create a highly innovative virtual event experience in WebAR, leveraging the power of 8th Wall to make it possible. The 8th Wall platform provided the robust functionality which was required to enable speedy loading times for an experience which utilised multiple event booths and interactive video touchpoints within a single immersive AR scene.
pot_noodle.overview.quote_citation: Michael Watson, Head of Operations at Aircards
pot_noodle.experience.paragraph: Unilever's Pot Noodle experience featured a scalable virtual career fair including a custom CMS that would allow the client to make changes to the 3D event booths and to deploy the assets in a WebAR environment. Students could “Tap to Place” the 3D career fair in their own world space and apply for the available jobs from a range of different employers. Each employer had their own branded virtual booth as well as a TV on their 3D table, enabling the brand to showcase a video which talks directly to the students. The experience was then promoted across social media by Student Marketing Agency Raptor Marketing.
pot_noodle.results.paragraph: The virtual career fair attracted 385% more attendees than previous in-person events. While at the virtual career fair, students spent on average 4 minutes and 30 seconds within the experience exploring and interacting with the 3D booths. This resulted in an 8% conversion rate of students who accessed the experience and applied for a job and resulted in ~500% increase in job applications as compared to previous IRL career fairs events.
pot_noodle.about.paragraph: <0>{{studioName}}</0> is an agency specializing in the development of Web-based Augmented and Virtual Reality experiences, with a highly talented in-house team of WebAR/VR developers, 3D artists, project managers and creatives. Providing an end-to-end service that includes consulting, ideation, design, development, hosting and analytics, Aircards is dedicated to ensuring they are at the forefront of innovation in the web-based immersive technology sector.
saatchi.stats.increase_spend.title: Increase in spend
saatchi.stats.likely_to_purchase.title: More likely to purchase
saatchi.stats.viewable_webar.title: Viewable products in WebAR
saatchi.meta.title: Saatchi Art WebAR - Case Study
saatchi.meta.description: Saatchi Art's ‘View in My Room’ web-based AR feature lets you view over 1 million works of art in your home before buying online.
saatchi.hero.heading: Saatchi Art lets customers view over 1 million works of art in their home using WebAR
saatchi.overview.paragraph:
World leading online art gallery Saatchi Art integrated a web-based augmented reality feature on its website called ‘View in My Room’ which enables over 1 million works of art to be viewed virtually in a shopper's room. Developed by AR design firm Rock Paper Reality, ‘View in a Room’ is one of the largest Web AR deployments to date for an ecommerce site.

The ‘View in My Room’ augmented reality feature allows art buyers to select artworks on SaatchiArt.com and instantly see them on their own walls using their smartphone or tablet, all with no app required. This is important because according to a survey by Saatchi Art, 70% of art buyers are hesitant to purchase because they can't see the artwork in advance. As a result, this feature has successfully helped art buyers with their buying decisions online with an average 17% increase in spending.
saatchi.overview.quote: We are super proud that Saatchi Art—the world's largest distributor of online art—picked RPR to develop one of the largest deployments of WebAR on 8th Wall's best-in-class platform. With over 1 million pieces of art available to view across the globe, the View-In-My-Room experience improved buyer confidence, drove sales conversions, and increased loyalty to the Saatchi Art brand.
saatchi.overview.quote_citation: Patrick Johnson, CEO and Founder of Rock Paper Reality
saatchi.experience.paragraph:
This first-of-its-kind production grade deployment was designed and architected for scalability across the entire site — each art piece is dynamically scaled based on the artwork’s metadata and deployed into AR on a 3D canvas with the approximate real-world dimensions of the physical artwork. It also includes a proximity indicator, which analyses the user’s position in the 3D scene and warns users when they are getting too close to the wall. As walls are often markerless, the proximity indicator was developed to improve the performance when tracking art.

This resulted in a seamless WebAR experience where users can now easily visualize and purchase artwork in their home to ensure it is just right before purchasing. To do this, users select the art they are interested in online and are presented with a “View in My Room” icon. After tapping the “View in My Room” icon, users can virtually place the art on their wall using augmented reality. Users can then take a photo of the art in their home or tap to add the art to their cart to purchase
saatchi.results.paragraph: Consumers who purchased on SaatchiArt.com and used the View in My Room WebAR feature spent on average ~17% more than those that purchased without the use of WebAR. Consumers who used the View in My Room feature were 4X more likely to convert than those that did not use the AR feature.
saatchi.about.paragraph: <0>{{studioName}}</0> is a veteran Augmented Reality agency that helps companies from startup to Fortune 500s develop best-in-class AR content and strategies proven to drive brand awareness, customer engagement, and revenue growth.
